channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: A Look at Janet Leigh's Rise to Stardom Through Rare 1940s Portraits
item.description: This article highlights a collection of 35 vintage portraits documenting Janet Leigh during the 1940s, while also tracing the remarkable beginning of her Hollywood career. Before becoming internationa...

item.title: World Cup Round-of-32 Highlights: Norway Defeats Brazil, England Faces Mexico in High-Stakes Match
item.description: The 2026 FIFA World Cup continued with dramatic round-of-32 matches, featuring standout performances and historic encounters. Norway secured a 2-1 victory over Brazil in New Jersey, with Erling Haalan...

item.title: Pakistan Armed Forces Commemorate Kargil Hero Lalak Jan Shaheed's Sacrifice
item.description: The Pakistan Armed Forces honored Havildar Lalak Jan Shaheed, a Nishan-e-Haider awardee, on the anniversary of his martyrdom during the 1999 Kargil conflict. ISPR highlighted his exceptional bravery, ...

item.title: Leah Sharibu Still in Captivity as Yobe State Focuses on Security and Reconstruction
item.description: The Secretary to the Yobe State Government, Mohammed Goje, confirmed that all Dapchi schoolgirls abducted in 2018 have been freed except Leah Sharibu, who remains in captivity. The SSG explained that ...

item.title: Stratton House Devastated by Overnight Fire
item.description: A residential property in Stratton, Western Australia, has been completely destroyed by a fire that broke out just after midnight. The blaze, which originated at a unit on Burton Retreat, was swiftly ...

item.title: Spain Defeats Portugal to End Ronaldo's World Cup Career
item.description: In a dramatic conclusion to Cristiano Ronaldo's World Cup journey, Spain secured a 1-0 victory over Portugal in a fiercely contested match, marking the end of the legendary player's career. Substitute...

item.title: Spain Defeats Portugal 1-0 in Dramatic World Cup Match
item.description: Spain booked their place in the quarter-finals of the 2026 FIFA World Cup after a 1-0 victory over Portugal in a thrilling round of 16 clash. The match, held at Dallas Stadium in Arlington, was decide...

item.title: Erling Haaland leads Norway to World Cup quarter-finals against England
item.description: Erling Haaland's remarkable performance in the FIFA World Cup 2026 has silenced long-time critics, propelling Norway to their first-ever quarter-final clash against England. The Manchester City strike...

item.title: Edmonton police investigate suspicious death following early morning incident
item.description: A suspicious death that occurred on Saturday morning in Edmonton has prompted the police's homicide sector to launch an investigation. Authorities responded to a weapons complaint at 6:30 a.m. near th...

item.title: Peter Obi accused of seeking Nigerian division by ex-govs, activists raise concerns
item.description: Former Borno governor Ali Modu Sheriff has claimed that Peter Obi, the NDC's 2027 presidential candidate, is pursuing the division of Nigeria due to his alleged support for Biafra. During an interview...

item.title: Assam Rifles personnel killed in Manipur ambush
item.description: Two Assam Rifles personnel were killed in an ambush in Manipur's Ukhrul district on Monday. The incident occurred around 1:30 pm at Nungshangohong village, where suspected militants planted three impr...

item.title: Supreme Court Upholds VAT Refund Law for Foreign Tourists
item.description: The Supreme Court (SC) has upheld the constitutionality of Republic Act 12079, which allows value-added tax (VAT) refunds on select purchases by non-resident foreign tourists. The 30-page decision by ...

item.title: Police investigate death of former deputy commissioner Mfazi
item.description: The South African Police Service (SAPS) has conducted raids on properties linked to members of the force in Centurion, as part of an investigation into the death of former deputy national commissioner...

item.title: Senator Marcoleta Appears in Court Amid Plunder Charges
item.description: Senator Rodante Marcoleta appeared in court before an arrest warrant was issued for plunder charges related to his campaign donations. The Sandiganbayan, the anti-graft court, ordered his arrest over ...

item.title: Canada to Procure New Submarines from German Firm by 2034
item.description: Canada has finalized a landmark defense procurement deal with the German company TKMS to supply advanced submarines by 2034. The agreement, announced in July 2026, marks the largest military acquisiti...

item.title: FIFA President Infantino Addresses Trump's Inquiry on Balogun Red Card Incident
item.description: FIFA President Gianni Infantino has reportedly received a phone call from former U.S. President Donald Trump regarding the controversial red card incident involving American player Folarin Balogun. Th...

item.title: Apple Re-enables Card Payments for App Store in India, RuPay Integration Coming Soon
item.description: Apple has resumed support for credit and debit card payments for app purchases and subscriptions on the App Store in India, aligning with Reserve Bank of India (RBI) tokenisation guidelines. Users can...

item.title: Opportunity Party's Rise in NZ Polls and Its Political Implications
item.description: The Opportunity Party (TOP) is experiencing a notable surge in New Zealand's upcoming general election polls, raising questions about its potential influence on the political landscape. Recent surveys...

item.title: Prince Harry's UK Visit and Court Case Against Media Outcomes
item.description: Prince Harry has commenced his return to the United Kingdom, marking the start of a week-long schedule of engagements. The Duke of Sussex will attend events in London for the Invictus Games, his chari...

item.title: Trump Faces Mockery for Rambling D.C. Crime Remarks
item.description: President Donald Trump drew online mockery after a rambling speech at the Rose Garden Club Lunch at the White House, where he discussed crime in Washington, D.C., and referenced historical figures lik...
